name: GIGABYTE B650 AORUS ELITE AX V2 ATX Motheroard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-8000(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C+A - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E
shortName: GIGABYTE B650 AORUS ELITE AX V2 ATX Motheroard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe
description: ATX gaming motherboard for AMD Ryzen 7000 series with B650 chipset, DDR5 support, and WiFi 6E.
